evals.prompt: Build next week's content calendar for Digischola. Idea-bank has 8 raw entries distributed across 3 pillars (3 LP Craft, 2 Solo Ops, 3 Small-Budget Paid Media).
evals.expected_output: Calendar markdown file written to Desktop/Digischola/brand/calendars/{ISO-week}.md with 12 slots. All 3 pillar-locked LI slots (Mon/Wed/Fri) filled. Thu carousel + Sat IG repurposes from strongest LI slot. X threads repurposed from Mon + Fri LI. Gap alerts section has 0 CRITICAL, 0 WARNING. 5-8 entries flipped raw → shaped with scheduled_week field.

assertions.name: calendar_file_written
assertions.description: File at brand/calendars/YYYY-WXX.md exists with correct ISO week naming

assertions.name: pillar_locked_slots_filled
assertions.description: Mon LI = LP Craft entry; Wed LI = Solo Ops entry; Fri LI = Small-Budget Paid Media entry

assertions.name: repurpose_chain_applied
assertions.description: Tue X thread inherits mon-li entry_id; Fri X thread inherits fri-li entry_id

assertions.name: sat_ig_repurpose
assertions.description: Sat IG has is_repurpose=true and entry_id matches a Mon/Wed/Fri/Thu LI slot

assertions.name: statuses_flipped
assertions.description: Matched entries in _engine/idea-bank.json have status=shaped and scheduled_week set

assertions.name: zero_critical_gaps
assertions.description: Gap alerts CRITICAL list is empty

assertions.name: exit_code_0
assertions.description: Script exits 0 for fully clean week

evals.prompt: Build next week's content calendar. Idea-bank has only 2 raw entries: 1 LP Craft (client-win, Thrive), 1 Solo Ops (build-log, wiki-lock). No Small-Budget Paid Media entries.
evals.expected_output: Partial calendar generated. Mon LI filled with Thrive entry + auto-repurpose to Tue X thread + Sat IG Reel. Wed LI filled with wiki-lock entry + repurpose to Wed X. Fri LI pillar-locked to Small-Budget Paid Media but 0 matching entries → CRITICAL gap. Thursday carousel + fresh X slots attempt flex matching; may flag INFO if pool is depleted. Distribution summary shows 3-4 of 11 slots filled. Exit 1 (warnings + critical present).

assertions.name: partial_calendar_written
assertions.description: Calendar file still written even with gaps

assertions.name: critical_gap_for_fri
assertions.description: Gap alerts CRITICAL includes fri-li for Small-Budget Paid Media

assertions.name: pillar_bank_gap
assertions.description: Gap alerts CRITICAL includes pillar-bank entry for Small-Budget Paid Media (0 raw entries)

assertions.name: volume_warning
assertions.description: Distribution alerts include CRITICAL for total volume (2 entries, well under 6-10 target)

assertions.name: mon_and_wed_filled
assertions.description: Mon LI + Wed LI both have entry_id assigned

assertions.name: exit_code_1
assertions.description: Script exits 1 (warnings + criticals, calendar still written)

evals.prompt: Build next week's calendar with --theme 'Landing-Page Conversion Craft' (themed week). Idea-bank has 5 LP Craft entries.
evals.expected_output: Themed calendar: all Mon/Wed/Fri LI slots assigned LP Craft entries (not the balanced Mon=LP / Wed=Solo / Fri=PaidMedia split). Thu carousel also favors LP Craft if format fits. Calendar markdown header shows 'Theme override: Landing-Page Conversion Craft'. Gap alerts may warn that other pillars are 'dark' this week (INFO level, not CRITICAL).

assertions.name: theme_applied_to_locks
assertions.description: Mon LI, Wed LI, Fri LI all have pillar_lock=Landing-Page Conversion Craft in the output

assertions.name: theme_header_present
assertions.description: Calendar markdown has 'Theme override: Landing-Page Conversion Craft' in header

assertions.name: all_three_li_slots_filled
assertions.description: 3 LP Craft entries assigned across Mon/Wed/Fri LI (no cross-pillar fallback)

assertions.name: no_critical_pillar_gaps_on_locked_days
assertions.description: Mon/Wed/Fri all filled; no pillar-locked CRITICAL gaps

evals.prompt: Build calendar when idea-bank is completely empty (0 raw entries).
evals.expected_output: Script BLOCKS with exit 2. Error message: 'BLOCKED: idea-bank has 0 raw entries. Run work-capture first.' No calendar file written. No entries flipped.

assertions.name: blocks_with_exit_2
assertions.description: Script exits 2

assertions.name: no_calendar_file_written
assertions.description: brand/calendars/ has no new file

assertions.name: no_entries_flipped
assertions.description: _engine/idea-bank.json entries[*].status remains unchanged

assertions.name: clear_fix_instruction
assertions.description: Error message explicitly names work-capture as the next step
